caption:
I continue to explore nearby areas, and this time I ended up in Tsubame Onsen ♨️ 

Filmed a detailed video on how to find this amazing onsen, where to pay, and all the do’s and don’ts. I’ll be sharing it very soon, but for now, here’s a little teaser 🥰 Stay tuned for part 2!

📍 Tsubame Onsen, Mt. Myoko
